overall.description: Gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character canoeing down a forested river surrounded by rocky outcrops and pine trees. The camera follows the canoe in third-person perspective as it navigates through calm to moderately rough waters with mountain scenery in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest river with scattered boulders and mountain backdrop

events.description: bird flies overhead from right to left across the sky

agents.ego_description: paddling canoe steadily downstream through calm river waters, navigating between large rocks

notable_agents.action: bird flying across the sky above the river

entered.detail: massive gray rock formation emerging from the river on the left bank
dense pine trees lining the left riverbank
dense pine trees lining the right riverbank
hazy mountain peaks visible in the distance beyond the forest
green grassy slope leading down to the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a tranquil river scene with a canoe paddling through calm green waters. Large boulders emerge from the river on the left while dense pine forests line both banks. A bird flies overhead as the canoe moves steadily forward, with hazy mountains visible in the distant background.

events.description: canoe steers left to navigate around rock formation in the center of the river

agents.ego_description: maneuvering canoe through rock-strewn section, steering around obstacles in the water

entered.detail: group of medium-sized rocks protruding from the water on the right side
scattered rocks in the main channel requiring navigation

segments.scene_description: The canoe enters a section with more concentrated rock formations scattered throughout the river channel. The large boulder from the previous section passes behind as the canoe steers left to avoid rocks in the center. The forested banks draw closer, creating a more enclosed feeling.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky river channel with faster current

events.description: water current becomes rougher with visible rapids and white water around rocks

agents.ego_description: paddling through narrower rocky channel with stronger current, navigating close to rock walls

entered.detail: large rock formations creating a narrow passage on both sides of the river
choppy water with white foam indicating faster current

segments.scene_description: The river narrows into a rocky channel with the canoe navigating between large rock walls on both sides. The water becomes choppier with visible rapids and white foam. The mountain backdrop shifts to the left as the canoe progresses through the tighter passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river valley with expansive mountain views

events.description: river widens into open valley with distant mountains becoming more prominent

agents.ego_description: paddling in open water with expansive views of forested valley and distant mountain peaks

entered.detail: wide expanse of river opening up with distant shorelines visible
snow-capped or hazy mountain peaks visible at the end of the valley

segments.scene_description: The canoe emerges from the rocky channel into a wide, open river valley. The water calms significantly as the river broadens, revealing expansive views of the forested valley and distant mountain peaks ahead. The rocky walls of the previous section fade behind as the scene opens up to a grander landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a canoe travels from a tranquil river through a narrow rocky gorge and finally into a vast open valley. It begins with the canoe paddling through calm green waters flanked by dense pine forests and large boulders, while a bird flies overhead against a backdrop of hazy mountains. As the canoe steers left to avoid concentrated rock formations, the forested banks draw closer and the environment becomes more enclosed. The scene then shifts into a tight rocky channel where the water turns choppier with visible rapids and white foam, squeezing the canoe between towering rock walls. Finally, the canoe emerges from the gorge as the river broadens and the water calms, revealing an expansive view of the forested valley and distant mountain peaks.
